calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing Against Defendants Dwight N Cooper And Appellate Law Group
Off Calendar Aug-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Dwight N. Cooper and Appellate Law Group.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Issa J. Michael, Esq. and Alexis Davidson, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiffs Martina Resendiz, who was not present for this morning's proceedings, and Issa J. Michael, dba the Michael Law Firm, who was placed under oath and testified.
Linda Resendiz, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
Ms. Resendiz appeared via CourtCall for today's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Dwight N. Cooper or Appellate Law Group.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Intentional Interference with Contractual Relations was filed on June 4, 2019.
Substitute service of plaintiffs' Summons & Complaint on defendant Appellate Law Group occurred on June 6, 2019 and was effectuated on June 17, 2019.
Substitute service of plaintiffs' Summons & Complaint on defendant Dwight N. Cooper occurred on June 10, 2019 and was effectuated on June 22, 2019.
Default as to defendants Dwight N. Cooper and Appellate Law Group was entered on September 30, 2019.
Plaintiffs' Statement of Damages was filed and served on September 30, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 19, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Martina Resendiz and Issa J. Michael, dba the Michael Law Firm, and against the defaulted defendants Dwight N. Cooper and Appellate Law Group, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $297,500.00.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.

Total - $297,500.00.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-28-2020 Continued To Sep-22-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-09-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Continued To Mar-04-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
